title: Ane no Koto ga Sukina Hittou Majutsushi-sama ni Migawari de Totsuidara, Naze ka Watashi ga Dekiai saremashita!?: Munou Reijou wa Kuni Ichiban no Kekkai Majutsushi ni Kaika suru

titleNative: 姉のことが好きな筆頭魔術師様に身代わりで嫁いだら、なぜか私が溺愛されました！？～無能令嬢は国一番の結界魔術師に開花する～

tags.name: Royal Affairs
tags.description: Features nobility, alliances, arranged marriage, succession disputes, religious orders and other elements of royal politics.

title: Chronicles of an Online Game Addict's Reincarnation in Another World: He Can't Use the Fighting Skill That Earned Him the Title of Fist King, so He Started Swinging a Club for Eight Hours a Day
titleRomaji: Netoge Haijin no Isekai Tenseiki: Ken Ou to Yobareta Saikyou no Kobunshi ga Tsukenai node, 1-nichi 8-jikan Konbou wo Furu Koto kara Hajimeta
titleEnglish: Chronicles of an Online Game Addict's Reincarnation in Another World: He Can't Use the Fighting Skill That Earned Him the Title of Fist King, so He Started Swinging a Club for Eight Hours a Day
titleNative: ネトゲ廃人の異世界転生記 拳王とよばれた最強の拳が使えないので、1日8時間こん棒を振ることからはじめた
synopsis: Kazuya finally became the strongest player in the VRMMORPG he devoted his life to and gained the title "Fist King." Just as he became number one, he was reborn in another world like the game, where monsters roam free! In this new world where firearms are favored over melee weapons, Kazuya takes up a club to once again pursue his ideal strength! (Source: MangaPlaza)
chapterSourceTitle: Senchi Kara Kaette kita Takashi-kun. Futsuu ni Koukou Seikatsu wo Okuritai

title: Ringoku kara Kita Yome ga Kawaisugite Doushiyou.
titleRomaji: Ringoku kara Kita Yome ga Kawaisugite Doushiyou.
titleNative: 隣国から来た嫁が可愛すぎてどうしよう。
synonyms: My Wife from the Neighboring Country Is So Cute, I Don't Know What to Do!
鄰國來的新娘太可愛了該怎麼辦？
synopsis: With his brash personality and muscular physique, and his fierce presence fighting against his country's foes, Salyu is known as the “Winter Bear of Tidros." Until one day when he finds himself engaged to Citron, a young lady whose betrothal was broken off in a neighboring country! Starting with a kiss on the forehead, he fidgets awkwardly around this unfamiliar woman. Her smile makes his heart race, and glimpses of her cleavage leave him flustered. Salyu's mind runs wild with naughty thoughts, pushing his sanity to the brink! This chaotic, heart-pounding romantic fantasy comedy begins — with his inner thoughts coming through loud and clear! (Source: Comic Pash, translated)

title: Denpa Kyoushi
synopsis: Kagami Junichirou was known as a physics genius when he was a teenager, and he was even published in "Nature." However, after college, he suddenly lost all interest in science. As a NEET, he's devoted himself to his anime blog and nerdy collecting habits. He claims he has a serious illness called "I can't do anything I don't want to do." Desperate to get him to do something with his life, his little sister manages to get him a job teaching physics at his old high school. He's certainly an unconventional teacher, but he becomes fairly popular with the students. After helping a girl who's being ruthlessly bullied, Kagami finds that he actually likes teaching. Will he continue his career as a weird teacher? Will he go back into physics? Or will he end up back where he started? (Source: MangaHelpers)

title: Mikoto-chan wa Kirawaretakunai!
titleNative: みことちゃんは嫌われたくない!
synopsis: My beautiful, big-breasted childhood friend, Mikoto, is completely in love with me. It sounds like a dream scenario that anyone would envy — but there’s just one big problem... She’s turned into a clingy, mentally unstable mess with love that's way too heavy!! This is a dark everyday comedy about being at the mercy of Mikoto’s unstable behavior and unintentional sexiness. Note: Mikoto-chan wa Kirawaretakunai! began as a web manga shared on the author's Twitter starting February 15, 2023, and has been published in print by Kadokawa since January 18, 2024.

title: Training Regimes of the World’s Strongest Women
titleRomaji: Saikyou Onna Shishoutachi ga Ikusei Houshin wo Megutte Shuraba
titleEnglish: Training Regimes of the World’s Strongest Women
titleNative: 最強女師匠たちが育成方針を巡って修羅場
synonyms: The Strongest Female Masters Are Warring Over Training Policy
synopsis: “These three could destroy the country all by themselves if they wanted… But there was one thing they just couldn't get.” For the three strongest adventurers in the world, finding a man strong enough to be with them is a herculean task. He simply doesn’t exist. With that in mind, they decide to take on a perfect novice—the level-zero, unremarkable Cross Alacart—and train him up to be their perfect match. Freshly expelled from Adventurers’ school, Cross sets his eyes on redemption; training hard and learning to believe in himself along the way. (Source: Comikey)

title: Mia is Back
synopsis: Mi-A was Tae-Su's first love, who suddenly disappeared one day. After five years of silence, she reappears as a freshman at his university. But she's not the girl he remembers. He plays it cool, trying to ignore her, but can first love truly be forgotten? Or w

title: You Shou Yan
synopsis: In the wake of scientific advancement, the once majestic mythological animals can't be compared to the olden days now. The mythological animal Sibuxiang received orders to descend to the mortal world and to help out other mythological animals in dire straits wandering the human world. In the secular world, he met his old colleague Pixiu in a tight spot, his drinking buddy Tuye down in his luck, and the gold and silver Jue brothers who were demoted to the mortal world... what kind of stories will happen between them? (Source: AC.QQ, translated)

synopsis: Rai is a space opera that fuses feudal Chinese and Japanese customs with vast galaxy spanning empires and space-going societies. The story follows the life and times of the samurai Rai, and the quest of several spacefaring factions for control of territory and, of course, the Empire.

titleRomaji: Anta to Osananajimitte dake demo Iyananoni!: Zekkou kara Hajimaru S-kyuu Bishoujo to no Gakuen Nariagari Seikatsu
titleNative: アンタと幼なじみってだけでもイヤなのに！～絶交から始まるS級美少女との学園成り上がり生活～
synonyms: S-kyuu Gakuen no Jishou "Futsuu", Kawaisugiru Kanojotachi ni Guigui Kitararete Barebare desu.
S級学園の自称「普通」、可愛すぎる彼女たちにグイグイ来られてバレバレです。
I Hate That We're Childhood Friends!: My Rise to the Top of School Life with an S-Rank Beauty Begins After a Falling Out
synopsis: Kazuma Suzuki was just your average high schooler—until his childhood friend, Rua Takayashiki, a beautiful, sharp-tongued girl who also happened to be the granddaughter of the school chairman and the nation’s top idol, cut all ties with him using a line straight out of a drama. Forced into submission for years as her so-called childhood friend, Kazuma decides it’s finally time for his first-ever rebellion. He’s done playing lapdog. This time, he’s taking back his freedom—and aiming for a normal school life. Escaping a powerful beauty like her is easier said than done... (Source: Square Enix)

title: The Knight in the Area
synopsis: Believing himself to be useless at football, Aizawa Kakeru opts to become the manager of his school's football team, while his brother Suguru is its ace, and is even good enough to represent Japan. However, Kakeru may be harbouring a strong talent within himself that only Suguru can see, and the two often get into arguments over Kakeru's denial of his skills. Things are made more complicated with the return of Nana, an old playmate of theirs that Kakeru has a crush on. Join the brothers in their journey to the national and even international championships! Story written under the penname Igano, Hiroaki.

titleNative: ブレイクニューワールド
synopsis: In a world where people are ranked by their trustworthiness, a young boy named Kiriya, who has had everything stolen from him by his rulers, embarks on a rebellion that will turn the world upside down. A forbidden sci-fi suspense story begins here. (Cycomi, Translated)

title: Youheidan no Ryouriban
synopsis: The story begins when Azuma Akari, a young man with an ambition to be a chef, trips into another world. Akari is picked up by Gangreve, the leader of a mercenary group. Akari joins the group as an odd job and gradually increases hia own value by demonstrating hia cooking skills. Each leader of the mercenary group is a quirky character, but Akari connects with them through his cooking. By improving the mercenary group's food situation and occasionally helping with inventions, Akari is gradually recognized by his fellow members of the mercenary group. However, Akari does not yet know that he himself will become a hero.

title: SUNNY Sixteen
synopsis: Niina Hanabusa, 16. Admired by her friends as someone who's “won in life on looks alone”, she quietly carries a complex about her deep indecisiveness, unable to make choices for herself. One day, a DSLR camera falls into her hands. With guidance from Mimiri, a former idol and alumna of her school, Niina begins to awaken to the quiet joy of pressing the shutter. (Source: Comic Days, translated)
